text: Welcome to SOST Talk. This is a moderated community space. The bot protects against spam, scams and noise — not criticism. Be respectful, report issues, and help make the protocol stronger.

OTC / P2P Board is now open. Hard rules: SOST Protocol does not intermediate, custody, or escrow any trade posted here. Admins never DM first. Use small test transactions. Anyone claiming to be "official escrow" or a "guaranteed buyer/seller" is a scam. Trade at your own risk. See the OTC rules in the community rules doc.
